item.name: Get Price entries by cropid and marketid
Get Price Entry by Farmer ID

request.description:
StartFragment

### Example A: Buyer → Farmer (from listing)

```
{
  "senderId": "buyer123",
  "senderRole": "BUYER",
  "receiverId": "farmer789",
  "receiverRole": "FARMER",
  "referenceType": "LISTING",
  "referenceId": "farmerEntry456"
}

 ```

---

### Example B: Farmer → Buyer (from demand)

```
{
  "senderId": "farmer789",
  "senderRole": "FARMER",
  "receiverId": "buyer123",
  "receiverRole": "BUYER",
  "referenceType": "DEMAND",
  "referenceId": "buyerDemand999"
}

 ```

EndFragment
